001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.app.Dialog;
004import android.os.Bundle;
005import android.view.LayoutInflater;
006import android.view.View;
007import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
008import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
009import androidx.fragment.app.DialogFragment;
010import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider;
011import com.google.android.material.dialog.MaterialAlertDialogBuilder;
012import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
013import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.R;
014import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.DialogAddIncubatorBinding;
015import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Incubator;
016import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel.IncubatorViewModel;
017import java.util.List;
018import java.util.Locale;
019
020/**
021 * Dialog fragment used to create or edit an incubator record.
022 *
023 * <p>The dialog supports both adding a new incubator and editing an existing one,
024 * including optional target temperature and humidity values.
025 */
026@AndroidEntryPoint
027public class AddIncubatorDialogFragment extends DialogFragment {
028
029  /** Argument key used to pass the incubator ID into the dialog. */
030  static final String INCUBATOR_ID_KEY = "incubator_id";
031
032  /**
033   * Creates a new dialog fragment instance for editing an existing incubator.
034   *
035   * @param incubatorId ID of the incubator to edit.
036   * @return configured dialog fragment instance.
037   */
038  public static AddIncubatorDialogFragment newInstance(long incubatorId) {
039    AddIncubatorDialogFragment fragment = new AddIncubatorDialogFragment();
040    Bundle args = new Bundle();
041    args.putLong(INCUBATOR_ID_KEY, incubatorId);
042    fragment.setArguments(args);
043    return fragment;
044  }
045
046  /**
047   * Creates and configures the dialog for adding or editing an incubator.
048   *
049   * @param savedInstanceState saved instance state, if any.
050   * @return configured dialog instance.
051   */
052  @NonNull
053  @Override
054  public Dialog onCreateDialog(@Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
055    DialogAddIncubatorBinding binding = DialogAddIncubatorBinding.inflate(
056        LayoutInflater.from(requireContext()));
057
058    long incubatorId = getArguments() != null
059        ? getArguments().getLong(INCUBATOR_ID_KEY, 0) : 0;
060    boolean editing = incubatorId > 0;
061
062    if (editing) {
063      Incubator existing = findIncubatorById(incubatorId);
064      if (existing != null) {
065        binding.incubatorName.setText(existing.getName());
066        binding.incubatorModel.setText(existing.getModel());
067        if (existing.getTargetTemperature() != 0) {
068          binding.targetTemperature.setText(
069              String.format(Locale.getDefault(), "%.1f", existing.getTargetTemperature()));
070        }
071        if (existing.getTargetHumidity() != 0) {
072          binding.targetHumidity.setText(
073              String.format(Locale.getDefault(), "%.0f", existing.getTargetHumidity()));
074        }
075      }
076    }
077
078    MaterialAlertDialogBuilder builder = new MaterialAlertDialogBuilder(requireContext())
079        .setTitle(editing ? R.string.title_edit_incubator : R.string.title_add_incubator)
080        .setView(binding.getRoot())
081        .setNegativeButton(android.R.string.cancel, (dialog, which) -> {})
082        .setPositiveButton(R.string.action_save, (dialog, which) -> {
083          String name = getText(binding.incubatorName);
084          if (name.isEmpty()) {
085            return;
086          }
087          Incubator incubator = new Incubator();
088          if (editing) {
089            incubator.setId(incubatorId);
090          }
091          incubator.setName(name);
092          incubator.setModel(getText(binding.incubatorModel));
093          incubator.setActive(true);
094
095          String tempText = getText(binding.targetTemperature);
096          if (!tempText.isEmpty()) {
097            try {
098              incubator.setTargetTemperature(Double.parseDouble(tempText));
099            } catch (NumberFormatException ignored) {
100            }
101          }
102
103          String humidityText = getText(binding.targetHumidity);
104          if (!humidityText.isEmpty()) {
105            try {
106              incubator.setTargetHumidity(Double.parseDouble(humidityText));
107            } catch (NumberFormatException ignored) {
108            }
109          }
110
111          IncubatorViewModel viewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity())
112              .get(IncubatorViewModel.class);
113          viewModel.save(incubator);
114        });
115
116    if (editing) {
117      builder.setNeutralButton(R.string.action_deactivate, (dialog, which) -> {
118        Incubator existing = findIncubatorById(incubatorId);
119        if (existing != null) {
120          IncubatorViewModel viewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity())
121              .get(IncubatorViewModel.class);
122          viewModel.deactivate(existing);
123        }
124      });
125    }
126
127    return builder.create();
128  }
129
130  @NonNull
131  private String getText(@NonNull View view) {
132    return ((android.widget.EditText) view).getText().toString().trim();
133  }
134
135  @Nullable
136  private Incubator findIncubatorById(long id) {
137    IncubatorViewModel viewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity())
138        .get(IncubatorViewModel.class);
139    List<Incubator> incubators = viewModel.getActiveIncubators().getValue();
140    if (incubators != null) {
141      for (Incubator incubator : incubators) {
142        if (incubator.getId() == id) {
143          return incubator;
144        }
145      }
146    }
147    return null;
148  }
149
150}
